Gap: No expert-validated Bangla clinical simplification corpus
Evidence_To_Extract: Rows with Bangla direct resources; construction=synthetic/paraphrase/summarization/NER, not simplification
Why_It_Matters: Without expert pairs, models cannot be safely trained/evaluated for patient-facing Bangla explanations.
Future_Work_Solution: Build BnClinSimp-Expert with clinician + lay validation.

Gap: Factuality often reduced to overlap/entity preservation
Evidence_To_Extract: Factuality_Mechanism in top-80 corpus; count lexical/NER vs NLI/graph/human
Why_It_Matters: Clinical safety failures are relation/negation/dosage errors, not only missing terms.
Future_Work_Solution: Clinical fact graph preservation + relation/attribute scoring.

Gap: No relation-level Bangla medical NLI benchmark
Evidence_To_Extract: Medical NLI papers and Bangla NLI resources; mark medical vs general-domain
Why_It_Matters: NLI gates cannot be validated in Bangla clinical domain.
Future_Work_Solution: 500-pair Bangla MedNLI pilot with contradiction categories.

Gap: Synthetic/automatic simplification data can introduce semantic drift
Evidence_To_Extract: Dataset construction column; synthetic vs expert-validated
Why_It_Matters: Synthetic corpora may teach models clinically unsafe paraphrases.
Future_Work_Solution: Use synthetic data only after NER/NLI/clinician filtering.

Gap: Graph/RAG grounding is rarely tested in low-resource simplification
Evidence_To_Extract: RAG/KG and constrained-decoding rows; Bangla relevance column
Why_It_Matters: Grounding methods are promising but evidence is English/general-domain heavy.
Future_Work_Solution: KG-RAG + graph-constrained beam search in Bangla.

Gap: Human evaluation is underpowered and rarely patient-centered
Evidence_To_Extract: Human evaluation fields: raters, expertise, kappa, patient comprehension
Why_It_Matters: Readability scores do not guarantee comprehension or safety.
Future_Work_Solution: Clinician + patient evaluation with kappa and power justification.

Gap: Search terminology is fragmented across simplification, lay summary, explanation, health literacy
Evidence_To_Extract: Search log returns by query; overlap/deduplication
Why_It_Matters: Narrow Boolean strings miss relevant studies.
